creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
A new version of mail/sympa5 is available.

Fix: 

-- 
WBR, bsam--k0M7SuXZsxZ4w1KS1pBlDMpGFQHGtTqR9dn9cXOonTeRiIY2

+++ Makefile	15 Aug 2009 20:44:57 -0000
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sympa
-PORTVERSION=	5.4.4

 CATEGORIES=	mail
-MASTER_SITES?=	http://www.sympa.org/distribution/old/
+MASTER_SITES?=	http://www.sympa.org/distribution/

 COMMENT=	Sympa is an electronic mailing list manager
